text: Survival Through Knowledge
textPreview: Survival Through Knowledge

text: A Unity space survival game where facts help you stay alive.
textPreview: A Unity space survival game where facts help you stay alive.

text: Built for BlairHacks 2026
textPreview: Built for BlairHacks 2026

textPreview: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 1

alt: Main menu screen from the game

text: The Problem
textPreview: The Problem

text: A lot of learning games feel like homework. A lot of action games do not teach much.
textPreview: A lot of learning games feel like homework. A lot of action games do not teach much.

text: Our idea
textPreview: Our idea

text: Make a game where learning is part of surviving, not a separate quiz page.
textPreview: Make a game where learning is part of surviving, not a separate quiz page.

text: Why it matters
textPreview: Why it matters

text: Players practice space facts while they are already focused and excited.
textPreview: Players practice space facts while they are already focused and excited.

text: Target users
textPreview: Target users

text: Students who like games, space, and fast challenges.
textPreview: Students who like games, space, and fast challenges.

text: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 2
textPreview: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 2

text: How The Game Works
textPreview: How The Game Works

text: Pick a planet
textPreview: Pick a planet

text: Start in the solar system and choose a planet level.
textPreview: Start in the solar system and choose a planet level.

text: Survive aliens
textPreview: Survive aliens

text: Aliens chase the player using pathfinding.
textPreview: Aliens chase the player using pathfinding.

text: Answer facts
textPreview: Answer facts

text: After 3 kills, the game pauses and asks a True or False planet fact.
textPreview: After 3 kills, the game pauses and asks a True or False planet fact.

text: Win with knowledge
textPreview: Win with knowledge

text: Correct answers add points. Wrong answers slow your progress.
textPreview: Correct answers add points. Wrong answers slow your progress.

text: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 3
textPreview: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 3

text: What We Built
textPreview: What We Built

text: 3D Unity scenes for the solar system and planet terrain levels.
textPreview: 3D Unity scenes for the solar system and planet terrain levels.

text: Alien enemies with NavMesh movement, attacks, health, death animations, and sounds.
textPreview: Alien enemies with NavMesh movement, attacks, health, death animations, and sounds.

text: A local AI question system using Ollama to make planet True or False facts.
textPreview: A local AI question system using Ollama to make planet True or False facts.

text: HUD screens for controls, win, lose, progress, and question moments.
textPreview: HUD screens for controls, win, lose, progress, and question moments.

text: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 4
textPreview: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 4

text: Technical Work
textPreview: Technical Work

text: Gameplay code
textPreview: Gameplay code

text: Player damage, alien attacks, death, win screens, kill tracking, and point tracking.
textPreview: Player damage, alien attacks, death, win screens, kill tracking, and point tracking.

text: AI questions
textPreview: AI questions

text: The game asks a local AI model for a true or false fact about the current planet.
textPreview: The game asks a local AI model for a true or false fact about the current planet.

text: World systems
textPreview: World systems

text: Planets move in orbit, enemies spawn from a dropship, and terrain levels use NavMesh data.
textPreview: Planets move in orbit, enemies spawn from a dropship, and terrain levels use NavMesh data.

text: Unity packages used include Input System, AI Navigation, URP, Post Processing, Shader Graph, and UI.
textPreview: Unity packages used include Input System, AI Navigation, URP, Post Processing, Shader Graph, and UI.

text: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 5
textPreview: BlairHacks 2026 | Survival Through Knowledge | 5

text: Why It Is Creative
textPreview: Why It Is Creative

text: The learning happens inside the action loop.
textPreview: The learning happens inside the action loop.

text: The player is not just reading facts. They need facts to win.
textPreview: The player is not just reading facts. They need facts to win.

text: Every planet can create different facts, so the quiz does not feel the same every time.
textPreview: Every planet can create different facts, so the quiz does not feel the same every time.

text: The space theme matches BlairHacks' constellation theme.
textPreview: The space theme matches BlairHacks' constellation theme.

text: It mixes shooting, survival, space, and education in one project.
textPreview: It mixes shooting, survival, space, and education in one project.

text: Rubric focus: impact, creativity, technical execution, demo quality, and future potential.
textPreview: Rubric focus: impact, creativity, technical execution, demo quality, and future potential.
